title: Add common site nav bar to labs

log.context: Add common site nav bar to labs

Done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Implementation: labs-router nav bar injection**

The approach was to intercept HTML responses in the labs-router proxy layer rather than modifying each individual lab. This way:
- All existing labs get the nav bar automatically
- New labs get it automatically
- No per-lab changes required

**Changes made:**

1. `/mnt/data/labs-router/src/index.ts` — commit `3708924`
   - Added `NAV_HTML` constant: a fixed 32px dark nav bar with `clung.us` (muted...(truncated)
